title: Better crafter
description: Adds a Smart Crafter block that automates crafting with recipe locking patterns and intelligent inventory management for redstone systems.
body:
# Better Crafter (Fabric 1.21.1)

If you're tired of hoppers clogging up your auto-crafters or having to build massive redstone clocks just to craft a few items, I made this mod to fix that.

It adds the **Smart Crafter**, which is basically a one-block replacement for complex auto-crafting setups.

**Why it’s actually better:**
* **It doesn't get clogged:** You can lock a recipe (ghost slots), and the block forces input slots to only hold 1 item at a time. No more hoppers dumping 64 iron into the wrong slot and breaking the machine.
* **No Redstone needed:** You can toggle "Smart Mode" to make it craft instantly whenever it has ingredients. No clocks or timers required.
* **Lag Friendly:** It has an internal buffer for output items, so it doesn't spew entities onto the floor and lag your server.

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ee8859e2f17a4b0ab3b6b6aa60d830d85064f72.png)

Want to create your own mod?

Join discord server: https://discord.gg/hSQpP4Mc
